4 | P a g e 
 
 
KULUMBUNUNA 
Kwiza  chakulinangula chachihya, echi chinalumuna vilongeselo vyakutanga  chakalikilamu 
inemanyina  hauhashi wakunangakana vyuma (competence based curriculum)  chinanehe 
kwalumuka mukulinangula vyuma kuhichila mukuvilinga kaha nachilingisa valongi kukwata 
chinyingi chamumyaka ino mukuzamikisa kupwa nachinyingi chakuzata milimo yakumavoko.  
Uno mukanda wavilongeselo vyamwakunangwila vakashikola vamuuthumbo vanausoneka mujila 
yauhashi wakunangakana vyuma vyanangwilo najishimbi jakumona nge kulinangula chinalitoto  
nakayoyelo kavathu. Mauhashi akunangakana vyuma vanahake mukalikilamu ya 2023  osena 
analitasana navyuma vyanangwilo vanasoneka mumukanda uno  
Mukanada unounemanyina hakukafwa  milongeshi  vanakunangula seteko yavalongi  vashikola 
yamuuthumbo kuputuka kunangula vilongeselo vyakalikulumu inemanyina hakunangula valongi 
vyuma vatela kulinga  (competence based curriculum) halwola kunahono mikanda vanetavila 
kuzachisa mumashikola. Echi chili nakusolola  kufwila chamuthango wafulumende watala 
vyamashilo kumona ngana ngwavo milimo yamulongeshi vanayashiwisa. Hakulinga ngocho, 
milongeshi vatela kuzachisa chinyingi valinacho chakutanga nakuwana vyuma vikwavo 
navivakafwako mukunangula valongi mumaukalu vanahase kuwana mukunangula vilongeselo evi .  
Ngunachifwelela ngwami milongeshi navazachisa mukanda ou mujila yakwoloka.  
 
Joel Kamoko (Mr.) 
Permanent Secretary- Educational Services 
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

5 | P a g e 
 
 
KUSAKWILILA 
Mukanda uno wavilongeselo  vyakutanga mu Luvale vyakunangula valongi mu form 1   vaulongesele 
kuhichila mukuhulyojola vathu vavavulu  nakuhomesa vathu hamwe. Vathu vavavulu hamwe kaha 
nanauka avathu akulisezaseza vavahulishile nakuvahana nawa lisesa lyakuhana vishinganyeka vyavo 
havyuma vayatela kusonekewa mumukanda uno. Shikaho ngunahane kusakwilila chami kuli vathu 
vose, namauka akulisezaseza  ahanyine chinyingi chavovo hamwe kaha lukafwa chamali 
chinahashisa 
kusoneka 
naukufwatula 
mukanda 
uno 
wavinangwilo. 
Ava 
vanapu 
milongeshi,vakhuluwa vahajizemba, mauka akulihandununa hamwe kaha navambwembwa. 
Mukukumisa, ngunasakwilila kulihana chavakakuza vakuchihanda chatala vilongeselo vyakutanga 
mumashikola cha Directorate of Curriculum Developmen hakuzata nakumona ngana ngwavo mulimo 
wakosoneka mukanda wakunangula vakashikola unazachiwa mujila yamwenemwene 
 
Charles Ndakala, (Dr.) 
Director – Curriculum Development 
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

7 | P a g e 
 
KUJIMBULA 
Mukanda uno wavilongeselo vyakunangula va fwomu 1  vanausoneka mangana ukafweko milongeshi 
mukunangula valongi vinangwilo vya Luvale. Mukalikilamu vanalumuna.  Uno mukanfa wavinangwilo  
vanausoneka managana uzachiwe mukwashiwisa kunangula valongi  vatete navaputuka  kulinangula 
vilongeselo vya 2023 kalikilamu shimbu kanda  kupwenga  kulongesa nakusonejeka  mikanda  ivene  vatela 
kuzachisa mukutanga nakutangisa. Mukutwalililaho, uno mukada uli nakusolola kufwila nakulihana 
chafulumende kuhichila kumuthango watala vyamashikola mukuputuka  kunangula vyakwalumuka 
chakutanga kalikilamu ya 2023 nawa inamono ngana ngwayo vyuma vanasoneka mumukanda uno vinatemo 
mukunangula valongi vyuma navalinangula nakuzata namavoko avo kweseka naseteko yakunangakana 
chalwola tunahetemo. 
Numba tuhu uno mukanda vanaukupwisa nakuzamikisa vyuma vyakunangula valongi, milongeshi vatela 
kuzachisa chinyingi nauhashi wakutanga chavo nakumona ngana ngwavo vali nakuhakilako vyuma vikwaavo 
vinahase kuzamikisa kutanga chavalongi chikumanyi haze vanamono ngana ngwavo hali liphwata. 
Kuhakilako nawa,  milongeshi vanahase kwalumuna milimo chipwe vyuma navalinga valongi  vili 
mumukanda uno kweseka nakupwa chashikola  nashikola vali nakutangilamo valongi. 
Vilongeselo vyosena vili mumukanda uno vanajinyina mukumona ngana ngwavo valongi vali nakulinangula 
vyuma navalinga namavoko avo anakuzamikisa nawa kujiminyina muvishinganyeka kaha nawa nakumona 
ngana nge khala  chihela  chipwe shikola valiho valongi  vanahase kulinangula mujila yamwenemwene. Echi 
kuvwovuwa khana chinemanyinana hakuhana uswa wakutanga  nakunganyala chakaliilamu yakukupuka                       
kuli khala longi cjakuzeneka kutala okwo afuma chipwe omu apwa.  
Hilufwelelo lwakumona nge mukanda ou  navinangwilo vilimo vavimone kulema  kupwa vyma navikafwa 
milongeshi kunangula  valongi chinyingi, uhashi nalilimi lyaLuvale  navilinga vyamwenemwene 
mukulinangula chakukupuka. 
MWAKUZACHISHILA MUKANDA 
Mukanda  ou unahane vyuma vize navatangisa mutemu yatete mu fwomu 1. Vanaupange mumitwe 
yavihande kaha mutwe wachihande uli navyuma vyakulihandununa vyakufwana nge kuhanjika na 
kwivwilila, kutanga chakujimina na kusoneka. Vyuma vili  omu mumukanda kavyeshi vilongeseloko 
oloze vyakuzachisa kusoneka vilongeselo.Hakuwahisa  vilongeselo watela kufumisa vihanda vya 
mutwe wachihande kuvyuma vyakulisezaseza. Chinjikizo, mutwe wachihande watela kupwa 
kuhanjika na kwivwilila, mazu, kutanga na kusoneka.Omu nauwahisa mutwe wachihande watela

8 | P a g e 
 
kusakula vyuma vyakunangula namilimo oyo vatela  kuzata nauhashi wakunangakana. Shikaho 
mutwe wachihande naupwa nauhashi wakunangakana vyuma vyavivulu.Ngocho, watela kusakula 
chuma echi nachimbata lwola lwalunene muchihande chove. Kuhakilako nawa, milimo vanakuhane 
mumukandavene ou kawatela kuyikumisa muchihande chimweko. Evi vanahase kuvikilikita 
muvilongeselo vyakulihandununa  handununa. 
MWAKUNANGWILA 
Hakunangula, mutwe wachihande watela kukava ngiza jijila jakutangidhilamo (jimisondi). Echi 
nachikukafwa kutangisa chinangwilo hichinangwilo vanale.

11 | P a g e 
 
CHIHANDE:  KUJIMBULA LITILICHA   
 
 
KWAULA: Kapetulu uno, mwatala hakulumbunuka chalizu Litilicha mujijila 
jakulihandununa, kuhunanana lizu lya Litilicha mumikuku yakulihandununa nakutunga 
lumbunwiso ya Litilicha.  
 
UHASHI WAKUNANGAKANA VYUMA: 
Valongi navapwa nauhashi wakushinganyeka mwakukunama nakuzachila hamwe.    
 
KASANGUMWISO:  
1. Watangaho, wamonaho, tahinyi wevwaho lyehi mujimbu  wakwivwishile kuwaha chipwe 
kupihya? 
2. Kweseka nomu watangile, wamwene chipwe wevwile, chinyingi muka wawanyinemo? 
 
 MAZU AMAHYA 
• Litilicha 
• Kuhunanana 
• kusambisa 
 
 
MUTWE WACHIHANDE 1: KULUMBUNUNA LIZU LYA LITILICHA 
KUJIMBULA: Chihande chino, valongi navatanjika lumbunwiso yalizu Litilicha mujijila 
jakulihandununa. Kaha nawa, navalumbununa jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha. Chamakumishilo, 
navalumbununa Litilicha.   
UHASHI WAKUNANGAKANA CHUMA:  
Valongi navalumbununa lizu lya Litilicha.  
KULUMBUNUNA LIZU LYA LITILICHA  
VYAKULINGA 1: Kutanjika jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha jakuliseza-seza. 
Mulongeshi: 
• Alweze valongi vawane chihandwa chili halumbunwiso ya Litilicha mumalimi akuliseza-
seza. 
• Mijimbu yamumikanda 
• Mijimbu yakutanjisa chinyingi 
Valongi: 
• vawane chihandwa chili halumbunwiso ya Litilicha mumalimi akuliseza-seza 
• vatanjike jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha jakuliseza-seza.

12 | P a g e 
 
 
 
KWEULULA MULONGESHI: 
KULUMBUNUNA LIZU LITILICHA 
 
Lizu Litilicha lyalumbunuka mujijila jajivulu. Jijila jimwe eji: 
 
1. Litilicha inapu uhashi  wakuzachisa lilimi nakusolola katwamino kavathu. 
2. Litilicha chapwa chitalilo chakatwamino kavathu muchitungilo. 
3. Litilicha anapu mazu awa akusoneka kanawa mangana asangumune vishinganyeka vyamuthu 
nakuzamisa kunangakana. 
4. Litilicha vinapu vishinganyeka vyakutaka kuzachisa lilimi mangana isosolole nakuhilula 
vyuma vyechi kusolokanga mukatwamino kavathu. 
5. Litilicha inapu mijimbu yayihi, mikunyi navihemo chikumanyi vize vili naulemu kechi 
kutalisa kuviseke kahako.  
6. Litilicha unapu mulimo wavisonejeka nautala havyuma vyakutaka muvishinganyeka 
vyamukakusoneka navyuma vyakuhona kutaka navihana ulemu hachisemwa chavathu. 
 
SETEKO YAKUNANGAKANA: Kutanjika jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha mukutesama. 
 
VYAKULINGA 2: KULUMBUNUNA JILUMBUNWISO JA LITILICHA. 
Mulongeshi: 
§ Alweze valongi vatanjike jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha jakuliseza-seza.  
§ Alweze valongi valumbunune jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha jakuliseza-seza. 
Valongi: 
§ Valongi vatanjike jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha jakuliseza-seza.  
§ Valongi valumbunune jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha jakuliseza-seza. 
 
KWEULULA MULONGESHI:  
KULUMBUNUNA JILUMBUNWISO JA LITILICHA. 
 
CHITALILO: Litilicha chapwa chitalilo chakatwamino kavathu muchitungilo. 
KULUMBUNUNA: Yeji kusolola ulemu, lufwelelo, vilinga na navyuma vinasoloka halwola 
vavisonekele. 
 
 
Valongi valumbunune jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha jili mwishi. 
 
ü Litilicha inapu uhashi  wakuzachisa lilimi nakusolola katwamino kavathu.

13 | P a g e 
 
ü Litilicha anapu mazu awa akusoneka kanawa mangana asangumune vishinganyeka vyamuthu 
nakuzamisa kunangakana. 
ü Litilicha vinapu vishinganyeka vyakutaka kuzachisa lilimi mangana isosolole nakuhilula 
vyuma vyechi kusolokanga mukatwamino kavathu. 
ü Litilicha inapu mijimbu yayihi, mikunyi navihemo chikumanyi vize vili naulemu kechi 
kutalisa kuviseke kahako.  
ü Litilicha unapu mulimo wavisonejeka nautala havyuma vyakutaka muvishinganyeka 
vyamukakusoneka navyuma vyakuhona kutaka navihana ulemu hachisemwa chavathu. 
 
SETEKO YAKUNANGAKANA: Kulumbununa jilumbunwiso ja litilicha mwakutamo. 
 
VYAKULINGA 3: KULUMBUNUNA LITILICHA 
Mulongeshi: 
§ Alweze valongi vatanjike jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha jakuliseza-seza.  
§ Alweze valongi vashimutwile nakusakula lumbunwiso nayivakafwa kweseka nakatwamino 
kamungalila yavo. 
Valongi: 
§ Vatanjike jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha jakuliseza-seza.  
§ Valongi vashimutwile nakusakula lumbunwiso nayivakafwa kweseka nakatwamino 
kamungalila yavo. 
KWEULULA MULONGESHI:  
KULUMBUNUNA LITILICHA 
Litilicha inapu milimo yakufwatula kufuma kuli mukakusoneka chipwe mukakuhanjika. Ou 
mulimo khana wahase kupwa wakuhanjika chipwe wakusoneka, kaha nawa weji kutalanga 
havyuma vili nakusoloka mujingalila.  
Liticha ikwechi lumbunwiso jajivulu eji munahase kuhakilaho.  
 
SETEKO YAKUNANGAKANA: Kulumbununa lizu lya Litilicha mukwoloka. 
 
VINOMA  
• Mikanda yakulihandununa 
• Mivwimbimbi yakutenga 
• Visaji vyamivwimbimbi  
• Shinga 
• Itaneti 
 
ESEKELO: 
1. Valongi vasoneke jilumbunwiso jalizu Litilicha mumikanda yavo. 
2. Valongi vayenga mukatunda kamikanda chipwe kuzachisa makina amyaka ino mangana vawane 
jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha jakuliseza-seza mulilimi lya Ingilishi nakujalumuna mu Luvale.

14 | P a g e 
 
KUKHUKULULA:  
Chihande echi, valongi vanatanjika lumbunwiso yalizu Litilicha mujijila jakulihandununa. Kaha 
nawa, vanalumbununa jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha. Chamakumishilo, vanalumbununa Litilicha.   
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
MUTWE WACHIHANDE 2: KUPEZALISA NAKUHUNANANA HALUMBUNWISO 
YALIZU LITILICHA

15 | P a g e 
 
  
KUJIMBULA:  Muchilongeselo chino, muli kaupezalisa nakuhunanana jilumbunwiso jalizu 
Litilicha. 
UHASHI WAKUNANGAKANA CHUMA:   
Valongi vatela kupezalisa nakuhunanana jilumbunwiso jalizu Litilicha. 
VYAKULINGA 1: KUSANDULULA JILUMBUNWISO JA LITILICHA JAKULISEZA-SEZA 
Mulongeshi: 
§ Ambate chati yajilumbunwiso ja Litilicha nakulamika halivavaya. 
§ Alweze valongi vashimutwile nakusandulula jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha jakuliseza-seza. 
 
   Valongi: 
§ Vatale hachati ili najilumbunwiso ja Litilicha vanalamika halivavaya. 
§ Valongi vashimutwile nakusandulula jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha jakuliseza-seza. 
KWEULULA MULONGESHI 
KUSANDULULA JILUMBUNWISO JA LITILICHA JAKULISEZA-SEZA 
1. Litilicha inapu uhashi wakuzachisa lilimi nakusolola katwamino kavathu. 
2. Litilicha chapwa chitalilo chakatwamino kavathu muchitungilo. 
3. Litilicha anapu mazu awa akusoneka kanawa mangana asangumune vishinganyeka vyamuthu 
nakuzamisa kunangakana. 
4. Litilicha vinapu vishinganyeka vyakutaka kuzachisa lilimi mangana isosolole nakuhilula 
vyuma vyechi kusolokanga mukatwamino kavathu. 
5. Litilicha inapu mijimbu yayihi, mikunyi navihemo chikumanyi vize vili naulemu kechi 
kutalisa kuviseke kahako.  
6. Litilicha unapu mulimo wavisonejeka nautala havyuma vyakutaka muvishinganyeka 
vyamukakusoneka navyuma vyakuhona kutaka navihana ulemu hachisemwa chavathu. 
 
SETEKO YAKUNANGAKANA: Kusandulula jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha jakuliseza-seza 
mukwoloka. 
 
VYAKULINGA 2: KULIFWANA NACHIHANDWA CHAJILUMBUNWISO JA LITILICHA 
JAKULISEZA-SEZA 
 Mulongeshi: 
§ Kuzachisa chati ili najilumbunwiso ja Litilicha, mulongeshi ahule valongi vashimutwile 
nakupezalisa chihandwa chili hajilumbunwiso ja Litilicha. 
 
  Valongi:

16 | P a g e 
 
§ Kuzachisa chati ili najilumbunwiso ja Litilicha, valongi vashimutwile nakuwana kulifwana  
nachihandwa chili hajilumbunwiso ja Litilicha. 
 
KWEULULA MULONGESHI 
Kuwana kulifwana nachihandwa chili hajilumbunwiso ja Litilicha. 
SETEKO YAKUNANGAKANA: Kushimutwila nakuwana kulifwana nachihandwa chili 
hajilumbunwiso ja Litilicha mukutamo. 
 
VYAKULINGA 3: KUSAMBISA JILUMBUNWISO JA LITILICHA JAKULISEZA-SEZA 
 Mulongeshi: 
§ Kuzachisa chati ili najilumbunwiso ja Litilicha, mulongeshi alweze valongi vashindakanye 
mangana kusongo vasambise jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha. 
Valongi: 
§ Kuzachisa chati ili najilumbunwiso ja Litilicha, valongi vashindakanye nakuhunanana 
kusongo vasambise jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha. 
 
KWEULULA MULONGESHI 
KUSAMBISA JILUMBUNWISO JA LITILICHA JAKULISEZA-SEZA 
Chitalilo: Litilicha inapu uhashi wakuzachisa lilimi nakusolola katwamino kavathu. 
Kuhakwila nakusambisa: 
Lumbunwiso ili helu inayi mukwamba ngwavo tunahase kuzachisa lilimi nakuwanyimo 
nganyo. Kwimba myaso chinahase kuneha nganyo. Kechi kwimba myaso kahako oloze 
nalwela nawa lunahase kutokwesa muthu apwenga mbombo. 
Echi tunalumbununa helu chikhiko kuhakwila nakusambisa lumbunwiso ya Litilicha. 
 
 SETEKO YAKUNANGAKANA: Kusambisa jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha mujila yakutamo. 
VINOMA: 
• Chati 
• Mikanda  
• Shinga 
• Itaneti 
• Kopyuta 
 
 
 
 
MULIMO:

17 | P a g e 
 
1. Valongi vahunanane jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha kweseka nachinyingi vanalinangula 
nakujisoneka mumikanda yavo. 
 
KUKHUKULULA: 
 
Muchilongeselo echi, valongi vanashindakanya, vanawane kulifwana nachihandwa cha lizu Litilicha. 
Kuhakilaho nawa vanasambisa jilumbunwiso jalizu Litilicha.

18 | P a g e 
 
 
MUTWE WACHIHANDE 3: KUTUNGA JILUMBUNWISO JA LITILICHA  
 
KUJIMBULA:  Muchilongeselo chino, muli kutunga jilumbunwiso jalizu Litilicha. 
UHASHI WAKUNANGAKANA CHUMA: Valongi vatela kutunga jilumbunwiso javo ja 
Litilicha. 
   
VYAKULINGA 1: Kutunga jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha kweseka nachinyingi chavo. 
Mulongeshi: 
§ Ambate chisaji chamivwimbimbi nakutalisa valongi chihemo. Chipwe, 
§ Ambate mukanda nakulweza longi umwe atange mujimbu. Chipwe 
§ Alweze longi ahanjike vihande vyalyepe vyakusehesa vakwavo. 
§ Alweze valongi vatunge lumbunwiso javo ja Litilicha kweseka navyuma vanamono 
nakwivwa. 
 
 Valongi: 
§ Vatale chihemo hachisaji chamivwimbimbi. Chipwe, 
§ Vambate mukanda nakutangila vakwavo valongi mujimbu. Chipwe 
§ Valongi vahanjike vihande vyalyepe vyakusehesa vakwavo. 
§ Valongi vatunge lumbunwiso javo ja Litilicha kweseka navyuma vanamono nakwivwa. 
KWEULULA MULONGESHI 
Valongi vatunge jilumbunwiso javo 
SETEKO YAKUNANGAKANA: Kutunga jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha kweseka nachinyingi chavo 
nakutesamo. 
 
VYAKULINGA 2: Kusambisa jilumbunwiso javo ja Litilicha. 
Mulongeshi: 
§ Alweze longi hilongi kuhakwila lumbunwiso yenyi natungu ya Litilicha. 
Valongi:  
§ Vahakwile lumbunwiso javo vanatungu ja Litilicha. 
          
   KWEULULA MULONGESHI

Litilicha yakuhanjika yeji kuzata milimo yakulihandununa eyi tunalumbununa kwishi: 
Kulama visemwa vyavathu 
Litilicha yakuhanjika yeji kulama chisemwa chavathu. Tunathachikiza chisemwa chetu, nge 
vana vavakachinyama mwomwo visemi jetu, vakhaka jetu navakulwane jetu veji 
kutunangulacho kufuma kuchisemunwino chimwe nakuya kuchisemunwino chikwavo.  
Kunangula chisemwa  
Chisemwa chavathu veji kuchinungulwila kuli vana vavandende kuhichila mukuvangula. 
Valuvale ngwavo mwafuma mukula mwashisa muyombo, yetu vali nakunangula hamene nawa 
tukanangule vakwetu omu mikula yetu nayikashiuka. Keshi nge vanyike kahako, navathu vali 
nalipwila lyakuthachikiza chisemwa chavo chipwe chisemwa chavakwavo vanahase navakhiko 
kulinangulacho. 
Katachikijilo kavathu 
Litilicha yakuhanjka yeji kukafwanga kuthachikijilaho vathu mwomwo yavyuma vatwama 
navyo vyakufwanan nge myaso, mawino, vilika, jingoma navyuma vikwavo.  
Kaputukilo kavilika vyachisemwa 
Vilika vimwe vyeji kuputukila navyuma vyakufwana nge mikunyi, kulaka, kusasa navikwavo. 
Nge vyuma khana vanavihanjika lyehi numbanyi chilika chiputuke.  
Kuneha uhashi wavathu hatoma 
Litilicha yakuhanjika yapwa jila yakusolweselamo uhashi nawana kalunga nahane vathu. 
Mawana khana anapu kwimba, kuhema vihemo, kusonga, kukina navyuma vikwavo. 
Kulilweza vishinganyeka muli muthu namukwavo 
Vishinganyeka vyamuthu, ushona, kuwahilila vanahase kuvimwena kuhichila mulitilicha 
yakuhanjika. 
Kulivwisa viseke (kuwaha)

39 | P a g e 
Litilicha yakuhanjika yeji kuneha viseke kuli vathu. Muthu nahase kutwama ukha wenyi 
likumbi lyangongo kwivwilila myaso. 
SETEKO YAKUNANGAKANA: Kulumbununa milimo ya Litilicha yakuhanjika mukutamo.

KWEULULA MULONGESHI  
KUSAMBISA MILIMO YA LITILICHA YAKUHANJIKA 
Litilicha yakuhanjika jechi kuneha viseke. Chuma muka nachisoloka kachi nge likishi 
mweza hashikola yenu? Ngunashinganyeka ngwami nou mwasala mushikola wauchi mwomwo 
muvosena kumwe namulongeshi wenu namuya nakutala likishi ali nakukina.  
Kusolwesa vishinganyeka vyavathu. Muthu nge ali naushona mwemba nawa myaso yaushona, 
ali mukuwahilila nawa mumumwena kukuhanjika vyuma vyalyepe mwomwo nawahilila.

40 | P a g e 
Kusolwesa mawana akuli Kalunga. Vathu vamwe veji kwimba kanawa nge tujila, vekha veji 
kesehesa vathu numba vali hachipeji mwomwo vali nakuhanjika mazu aseya, vekha nawa veji 
kuhema vihemo nge mwamuchano. Vakwavo nawa veji kuhanjika mikunyi, kusonga, kufunjika 
mivwimbimbi namawana akwavo. 
Kaputu kavilika vyachisemwa. Muthu wakufwa uze navamba ngwavo nafu veji kusanyikanga 
chimbanda mangana valinge chikondo, uze chivimbi enyike valoji jenyi vanamujihi. Chilika 
khana echi kuchilinga kuvanga, naye yauze mufu nasase (kusasa mazu) numba chize chivimbi 
chikatuke nakwinyika valoji. Chakuhona kusasa nachitwama kaha chakuhona kulinga vyuma 
vimwe. 
Kathachikijilo kavathu. Nge muthu mwamona makishi, jisangu, chipwe mwali uze vanavwikila 
navathachikiza ngwavo vaze valuvale. Chisemwa hichisemwa chatwama navyuma vize vathu 
vanahase kuvathachikijilaho. Vakwetu va Luyi nawa vavathachikijila kuwato wavo vavuluka 
ngwavo Nalikwanda. 
Kunangula chisemwa. Kutwala vana kumatungu namikanda cheji kukafwangako kuvanangula 
chisemwa chavaluvale. Myaso jeji kunangula myali natundanji. Vishimo vyatunya vyakufwana 
nge Vishimo vyambwanda vyeji kunangula vathu mwakutwamina navakwavo mujindanda. 
SETEKO YAKUNANGAKANA: Kusambisa milimo ya Litilicha yakuhanjika mwakutamo.

UKALU ULI NAKUSEFUKA MUJINGALILA 
Ndangwishi jakuhanjika vanahase kujizachisa kukanda muthu kwecha vyuma vyavipi 
(vyakufwana nge kuzachisa vitumbo mujila yakuhenga, kutema mitondo chitemena …)  
Vishimo vyakuhanjika vanahase kuvizachisa kuvita mangana vatangise upi watwamaho 
hakuzachisa majika-kanwa, lizangamina nawiji, kuhutwa namaukalu akwavo.

42 | P a g e 
Mikunyi vanahase kuyihanjika mangana veulule vathu vathachikize kupiyha chakutema misenge 
echi chili nakuneha kwalumuka chajingonde. 
Chilandu chamukanwa nawa muthu nahase kuchizachisa mangana afungulule vathu valande 
hoka yenyi. Kuzachisa chilandu chamukanwa nachihasa kukoka vathu kulanda vyuma numba 
kavazanganga kuvilandako. Kunahu muthu mwayovoka kufuma kuuhutu. 
Vihemo navikhiko tunahase kuvizachisa kunangula vathu kukumisa ukalu uli nakusefuka 
mujingalila. Ukalu khana wakufwana nge vikhokojola mukachi kamaphwevo namalunga, 
luyanjisa lyavanyike, kuzachisa vitumbo mujila yakuhenga.

Kutambasana chinyingi 
Vathu veji kulitambasana chinyingi chavyuma vahona kuthachikiza hano hakaye kuhichila 
mukutanga mikanda yakulihandununa yakufwana nge; mapepa amijimbu. 
Kulela vanyike vavandende mujila yambwende 
Vishimo vyatunyama vize vili mumikanda vyeji kukafwanga vana vavandende vathachikize 
kuwaha nakupihya. Hakulinga ngocho navasakula kulinga mwamwaza mangana vatwame 
navakwavo vathu kanawa muchitungilo. 
Kulivwasana vishinganyeka 
Litilicha yakusoneka yeji kuhashisa mukakusoneka nauze mwatanga vili mumukanda 
valivwasane muvishinganyeka. Mukakusoneka eji kuhana vishinganyka vyenyi hakuyoya 
chahano hamavu. Mukakutanga namukakusoneka veji kulivwasana havihande vimwe 
nakulimbalaka nawa havihande vikwavo.  
Kulivwisa viseke chipwe kuwaha 
Vathu vavavulu veji kulwivwisa viseke hakutanga mikanda chipwe mijimbu. Mikanda 
yinahase kutwala muthu muvishinganyeka kuvihela kuze kanda ayengangako lyehi. 
Kuwana utongwe nauhashi wachuma 
Litilicha yakusoneka yeji kuhashisa vathu vawane mawana avo vavahana kuli Kalunga. 
Utongwe tunahase kuumwena kukufunda mivwimbimbi, kusoneka navyuma vikwavo.

Hamakumbi mwayoyela muthu hano hamavu, echi kuwana vyuma vyakumupinjisa 
mukuyoya chenyi. Kukanyisa ukalu khana, muthu atela kutanga mikanda yakulihandununa 
chipwe mijimbu mangana awanemo chinyingi chachihya chimukafweko muchiyoyelo 
chenyi.

nakutesamo.

Kuhema kanawa vihemo 
Litilicha yakusoneka yeji kukafwanga vathu vali mumivwimbimbi kuzata kanawa mulimo 
yavo vanavahane mwomwo mazu navahanjika vanawasoneka lyehi halipepa kaveshi 
kuwavulyamako. 
Kuneha kuwaha nautongwe 
 Uthongwe tunahase kuumwena kukufunda mivwimbimbi, kusoneka navyuma vikwavo. Vathu 
vamwe vanavahane wana wakufunjika muvwimbimbi wamuthu halipepa kaha vali 
nakuwanyinaho chiyoyelo. 
Kuwana chinyingi chachihya 
Chinyingi chachihya tunahase kuchiwana mumikanda. Valongi kuthachikiza vyuma vyavivulu 
kuvanga vatange mumikanda. Muthu nahase kuthachikiza chisemwa navilinga vyavathu 
vakwavo numba tuhu kanda lyehi ayenganga kuchihela khana.  
Kulela vanyike vavandende mujila yambwende 
Kuzachisa vishimo vyatunyama vyeji kulweza vanyike kupwa vakuvanguluka nakulemesa 
vakwavo vathu.  
Kulweza vishinganyeka 
Kutanga mikanda yamijimbu yeji kununga mukakusoneka namukakutanga valivwasane 
muvishinganyeka. Hakutanga mikanda, mukakutanga nahase kwolola haze namono nge 
hanahenge chipwe kuhana vishinganyeka vyenyi hauze mujimbu natange.   
Kulivwisa viseke chipwe kuwaha 
Mikanda yamujimbu imwe inahase kulingisa muthu atwame nazala mwomwo yakuyema 
chauze mujimbu. Chipwe kutala mivwimbimbi chinahase kuwahisa muthu kumuchima.

Mama! Mama!

Ngunakuvulumuna ika ami

KULUMBUNUNA JIJILA JAKUZACHISHILAMO LITILICHA YAKUSONEKA 
MANGANA VATHU VAFUMBIWE NAKUHILUKA KUCHISEMWA CHAVO 
Kusoneka mikanda havyakulya vyachisemwa vize tunajimbalisa.  
Muchisemwa chetu, vathu vapwilenga nakulya vyakulya vyakuwahisa mujimba vize Kalunga 
avahanyinenga hajingonde jakulihandununa. Lwola luno vathu vanafumu lyehi kuvyakulya 
vyachisemwa hivanazange lyehi vize vyakulanda kaha muvitanda. Nge muthu mwakumona uli 
nakulya kalitunga kove, nyi phamo unasungu shivi jove, navakumona nge unasalila

52 | P a g e 
uwakuhutwa chikuma. Oloze kachechi ngochoko. Vyakulya khana vize, vyachisemwa, 
vyatwama nanganyo yakuwahisa mujimba chiyovo. Tuyenu tutonde vyakulya vyetu vyosena 
vize twalilenga mangana tuvilweze vana vetu natukwatambuli vakavimone nakuvilya 
navakhiko. 
Kusoneka mikanda yamijimbu hachiyoyelo vayoyelenga vakhakuluka jetu hamyaka.  
Kumyaka vathu muchitungilo yayoyelenga nge vathu valijimo limwe. Kachi nge khaka 
Kapolongo mwawana vanyike vali nakulinga vyuma vyavipi, ikhiye hakupwa mukulwane ali 
nalisesa lyakuhuhumuna uze kanyike mwomwo muzukulyenyi numba tuhu keshi kausoko 
kenyiko. Oloze makumbi ano, yoveya mutenukila mwanamukwenu kunahu kaha unavikoko 
lyehi. 
Kutanga mikanda yayivulu vanasoneka kuli vakwetu vathu velava mangana kuhakileko 
chinyingi chetu chachisemwa chetu. Vakhaka jetu va Patrick Wele,  W.R Mwondela, Coster.C 
Fumbelo, Marvis.C Samukwamba navakwavo vanasoneka chinyingi chachilemu echi chili 
mumikanda. Twayenu tuchitange mangana tuhilwise chisemwa chetu echi chili nakunawa. 
Kuhunanana ha Litilicha yakufuma kumafuchi ekha. Mikanda imwe ya Litilicha yakufuma 
kumafuchi ekha, vathu vamwe vanasoneka vyuma vyavipi vyakupihisa chisemwa chavathu 
vakwavo. Keshi nge vyuma vyosena vyachisemwa chetu vyapwa vyavipiko. Tuhunananeho 
kanawa kuhichila mukutanga mikanda mangana tusangule chisemwa chetu. 
Kusoneka mikanda havitumbo vyachisemwa 
Vipatela kumyaka kavyapwilengako. Muthu wilava apwilenga navitumbo vyakuzachisa kuka 
misongo yakulihandununa. Mafwo etu namiji vyapwilenga nakufwa kuka misongo chiyovo. 
Tuzachisenu vitumbo vyetu vyakufuma kumitondo atuhana Kalunga. 
Kuzachisa chikuma lilimi lyetu lyachisemwa mukusoneka

53 | P a g e 
Vathu veji kuhanjikanga lilimi lyavo, veji kuvamona nge vanasalila kavaya kushikolako. Oloze 
muthu nge mwahanjika lilimi lyekha, navamumona nge hichindele wakufuma mumangalande 
chipwe nge lihando. Mwomwo ika natwivwila sonyi yakuhanjika nakusoneka lilimi lyetu 
lyamwaza ngana atuhana Kalunga? 
Kulama vijila vyetu vyachisemwa mumikanda nakuvitanga 
Vijila vyachisemwa vyapwa jila imwe yakulaminamo chisemwa chavathu. Valuvale vatwama 
navilika vyavivulu veji kuhananga kalemesa mukuyoya chavo. Kumyaka chapwilenga chijila 
mukatata kusapulwisa mukamama chipwe mukamama kuteta mihya yachijiji. Lwola luno 
vyuma vinalumuka. Tulamenu vijila vyetu mwomwo chikhiko chisemwa chetu vatela vathu 
vekha kututhachikijilaho.  
Kusoneka vilika vyetu vyosena mumikanda 
Kusoneka vilika vyachisemwa mumikanda inapu jila imwe yakulaminamo chisemwa 
chavathu. Valuvale vatwama navilika vyavivulu. Kupwa napwipwi yakuthachikiza vilika 
nomu mwakuvilingila nachipwa chuma chamwaza. Tusonekenu vilika vyetu mangana 
tulemese chisemwa chetu. 
Kuhema vihemo vyavivulu hachiyoyelo nachisemwa chavathu.  
Tunangulenu vathu kuhichila muvihemo vyahamivwimbimbi haulemu uli hachiyoyelo 
nachisemwa chavathu. Vaze vakwetu vali mujimbaka nakumafuchi ekha vatela kuthachikiza 
chisemwa chetu kuchina vana kujimbalila muvisemwa vyekha.

KULUMBUNUNA MIYACHI YA LITILICHA YAKUHANJIKA

mumiyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika. Miyachi khana ikhiko eyi vanalumbununa mwishi: 
Tushimutwiji  
 Tushimutwiji hivihula vili namangana akusweka. Muthu jino nge vanamuhulisa, atela 
kushinganyeka chikuma mangana afwanyise nachuma chikwavo. 
Chitalilo: Zuvo yamujingulwile = Liulu 
 Mijimbu vafwelela vathu 
Eyi yapwa mijimbu yakuhona kuthachikiza okwo yafuma. Tweji kuyizachisanga mangana 
tuhase kusolola lufwelelo lwetu muli tulunga twafwelela muchisemwa chetu. 
Chitalilo: Mijimbu yatengeso yalilu namavu mumukanda wa Kalunga 
Mijimbu yavyuma vyakutaka chipwe vyamuchano 
Mijimbu yakutaka yapwa yakutunga kuli muthu oloze yamuchano yeji kwambulula vyuma 
vyasolokele kuli muthu. 
 Mikunyi 
Mikunyi yapwa hanjikiso yakusoneka nge mwaso chipwe tuhu ngwetu jivesi.
